description: Style NoteLove laid-back Italian style? Now all you need is a pair of white linen pants and these sandals from arrow. Lounging by the poolside, vacationing at a beach resort or simply chilling at a sushi joint, this pair from Arrow is the right footstyle choice simply because it's sleek and stylish without the bulk of usual men's sandals. Product DetailsBlack strips of narrow leather across the midfoot and a toe holderPadded footbed with stitch detailingTPU outsole with diagonal and circular groovesMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
